notes: Unions capture spouse/partner relationships and marriage metadata.
Parent-child and children-of-union edges are both retained for flexibility.

branches.name: Fortney / Forthun Branch
branches.subtitle: Norwegian Origins · Forthun Farm, Luster, Norway

branches.name: Mulhearn / O'Brien Branch
branches.subtitle: Irish Origins · County Clare & County Donegal

persons.name: Aamund Jonson Forthun
persons.notes: Earliest known ancestor. Farm manager, Bnr #1. Father of Claus Aamundson.

persons.name: Adrian Hilman Dahl
persons.notes: Nuclear Physicist, Professor. Visited Fortun, Norway and acquired the authoritative Luster: Gards-og aettesoge.

persons.name: Agnes Marie Fortney
persons.notes: 3 daughters.

persons.name: Agnes McEntee ('Nanny Agnes')
persons.notes: Matriarch. Daughter of Bernard Sylvester McEntee and Sarah O'Brien. McEntee name (Gaelic: Mac an tSaoi, 'Son of the Scholar') traces to County Donegal, Ireland. Married Robert Mulhearn; together had ten children.

persons.name: Alan Dale Fortney
persons.notes: Senior Quality Control Manager, CamCraft. Married Pamela Gerring (b. 1946, d. 2005 age 59). 2 daughters. 3 granddaughters, 1 grandson.

persons.name: Alan Jon Fortney
persons.notes: Born on the day his father received his army commission. BA University of Wisconsin–Madison (English, 1963); studied at University of Copenhagen (1961–62). Teacher at Southern Vermont College, Bennington College, and Mount Anthony Union High School (retired 2008). Founded Woodlands Pathways (~1992). Published Go Light (Shires Press, 2009). Married Jill Andersen Fortney. Primary compiler of the family history; visited the Forthun farm in 2005.

persons.name: Albert Christian Fortney
persons.notes: Albin's older brother. Photographed with sister Nettie — described as 'Etta and Sundance — or Bonnie and Clyde, depending on your generation.' Wife Viola Vennes: born 1892, died 1971, Withee, Wisconsin. Teacher. Remarried Franklin McMiller after Albert's death. Famously said: 'I taught all the Fortney boys and married the eldest.' Taught at Lockheil School, still visible northwest of the farm.

persons.name: Albin Leonard Fortney
persons.notes: Chaplain Major, US Army. Served in WWII (Hawaii at Pearl Harbor, later European theater) and Korea. Married Anita Linnea Södergren, 28 May 1935. Died of colonic cancer, 10 days before his 33rd wedding anniversary.

persons.name: Alexi LaRae Olson Thompson
persons.notes: Zachary Thompson is a pastor.

persons.name: Andrea Elizabeth Olson Bach
persons.notes: Event management. Married Matthew Bach (b. 7 Feb 1973), 31 July 1995, Bloomington MN.

persons.name: Andrew B. Andersen II
persons.notes: Married Shirley Mulhearn. Father of six children including Jill Andersen Fortney. Served in World War 2 as post-Normandy forces in Paris. He met Shirley in England just before his unit was moved to France, she was in the Women's Auxiliary Corps.

persons.name: Anita Linnea Fortney
persons.notes: Married William Harms. Moved to Muskegon, Michigan.

persons.name: anita_sodergren
persons.notes: Born in Moline, IL; family moved to Burlington, IA. Married Albin Leonard Fortney, 28 May 1935, Minneapolis. Died 4 July 1990, before breakfast, in Skaalen Home after 22 years as a widow. Mother of four.

persons.name: Ashley Renee Olson Keith
persons.notes: Ryan Keith b. 26 Aug 1972, Rome GA. Teacher.

persons.name: Benjamin Dahl
persons.notes: Adopted. Growing up (as of 2007). 1 son (Aicee, adopted).

persons.name: Brody Scott Jessen
persons.notes: Age 9 months in 2007.

persons.name: Rev. Carl Johannes Södergren
persons.notes: Lutheran minister. Father of six children, including Anita Linnea. Family deeply rooted in Lutheran ministry.

persons.name: Rev. Carl Wendell Södergren
persons.notes: Lutheran minister. Married Eunice. Anita's family stayed near him in Portland, OR during WWII.

persons.name: Christine Ellen Fortney
persons.notes: Secretary/Office Worker, then farmer (ret.). Married 1st Ken Faber (4 children), 2nd Rolph Anderson (4 children).

persons.name: Christopher Allan Jessen
persons.notes: Single. Adopted daughter Mariah (age ~16 in 2007).

persons.name: Clarence Edward Fortney
persons.notes: Worked at General Motors. Married Anna Skreen, 21 August 1918, Wheeler, WI. Wife Anna Skreen born 22 June 1900, Fargo, ND; died 14 November 1990, Houghton Lake, MI.

persons.name: Cynthia Diane Fortney
persons.notes: Married Lauren Arthur Vaughn (b. 19 Oct 1953, Pontiac MI), 27 July 1996, Traverse City MI.

persons.name: Daniel Richardson
persons.notes: College student (as of 2007).

persons.name: David Adrian Dahl
persons.notes: Electrical engineer (retired), consultant for Ion Optics. Married Elizabeth 'Beth' Hunter (b. 19 June 1946, Los Angeles CA; Federal Contracts), 5 June 1966, Fort Collins, CO. 1 son, 2 adopted daughters, 1 adopted son. 1 grandson, 4 adopted grandchildren.

persons.name: Dawn Marie Fortney Maidl
persons.notes: Insurance claims examiner. Died 26 June 2004.

persons.name: Douglas Nelson Fortney
persons.notes: Married Christina Sue McCorkle (b. 2 Dec 1965, Lansing MI), 10 June 1989, Lansing MI.

persons.name: Ehren Richardson
persons.notes: Iraq veteran, college student (as of 2007).

persons.name: Elise Rae Thompson
persons.notes: Newest member of the tribe, born May 2007.

persons.name: Gabriel Dean Madsen
persons.notes: Twin.

persons.name: Hans Thomassen Fortney
persons.notes: Patriarch of the American Fortney family. Married Maria Johanna Swangstu, 6 April 1887. Moved family to Wheeler, WI in 1907. Had 10 children.

persons.name: Henry Martin Fortney
persons.notes: Wife Caroline Margaret Smith born 18 May 1913, died 1994. Elementary teacher. Married 23 May 1936, Colfax, WI.

persons.name: Hillman Arnold Fortney
persons.notes: Retired. 2 daughters, 2 sons.

persons.name: Jeanette 'Nettie' Leah Dahl
persons.notes: Commercial Pilot, flight instructor, account manager. Died 2006. 1 son (Tyler), 1 daughter (Morgan).

persons.name: Jed Thomas Matthew Madsen
persons.notes: Tru-Green Lawn Care manager. Married Cindy Diadoo (b. 30 Jun 1975, environmental health/safety manager), 7 May 2005, Menomonie WI.

persons.name: Jesse Jade Dahl
persons.notes: Educator — linguistics; information technologist. 1 son (Zane), 1 daughter (Lily Jade).

persons.name: Jesse Jacob Madsen
persons.notes: Math teacher, coach. Married Devan Keith (b. 22 Jun 1979), 2 September 2003, Fresno CA.

persons.name: Jessica Dahl
persons.notes: Adopted. Sprint Systems Technologist. 1 son Evyn, 1 daughter Gweneth.

persons.name: jill_andersen
persons.notes: Born 15 June 1951. Art teacher and sixth-grade teacher in Bennington, VT schools. BS Summa Cum Laude, North Adams State College (1978). Married Alan Jon Fortney. Photographer — Forthun village photos were taken by Jill during the 2005 Norway trip.

persons.name: Jon Arthur Dahl
persons.notes: Environmental scientist. Married Kathleen Joan 'Kate' Hiemenz Dahl (b. 20 June 1949; Registered Nurse, Environmental Program Manager), 14 August 1969, St. Cloud, MN.

persons.name: Jonda Kay Langford Martin
persons.notes: Business owner, CEO. Married Daniel Martin (b. 5 Feb 1961), 29 October 1995.

persons.name: Kari Bergum Irber
persons.notes: CPA. Married John Irber (b. 10 April 1961, St. Paul MN), 10 June 1989, Hinckley.

persons.name: Karn Louise Fortney
persons.notes: Art Teacher (ret.). Married 1st Rick Rock (4 sons), 2nd Orrin Anderson (no children).

persons.name: Kathe Bergum Matthews
persons.notes: CPA. Married John Matthews (b. 30 May 1961, Minneapolis MN; CPA), 9 November 1991, Hinckley MN.

persons.name: Kelly Gaynor Bergum
persons.notes: High School counselor.

persons.name: Kendall Anders Fortney
persons.notes: Artist & filmmaker. Born 5 July 1981. Named for his uncle Kendall Thomas Fortney, KIA Vietnam 1968. Studied Okinawan karate; Vermont Statehouse Page (8th grade). Early interest in public television film production.

persons.name: Kendall Thomas Fortney
persons.notes: Army medic. KIA Vietnam, 6 February 1968. Initially listed as MIA due to bureaucratic error; identified with help of Senator William Proxmire. Named for his great-uncle Thomas Kendahl Fortney.

persons.name: Kent Bergum
persons.notes: High School Principal.

persons.name: Kerri Fortney
persons.notes: Married 1st husband, 1 daughter Samantha (age 9 in 2007), 1 son Kyle (age 7 in 2007). Also Jonathon Joseft, 1 daughter Audrey.

persons.name: Kerry Dean Larson
persons.notes: Accountant. Married Betsy Weinhaus (b. 7 Jul 1968), 20 February 1996, Ixtapa, Mexico.

persons.name: Knut Aamundson Forthun
persons.notes: Married Synneva Clausdotter 1653. Brought Bnr #8 into the family.

persons.name: Knut Torgerson Forthun
persons.notes: Farm manager Bnr #8. Had four wives; main line continues through wife Marta Olsdotter Svalheim.

persons.name: Konval Harlan Bergum
persons.notes: District Conservationist (US Soil Conservation Service); Lutheran Brotherhood. 2 daughters.

persons.name: Lanette Dahl
persons.notes: Adopted. College student (as of 2007). 1 son, James.

persons.name: Laura Beth Langford Walleen
persons.notes: Regional human resource manager. Married Richard Walleen (b. 23 Nov 1964), 4 May 1991.

persons.name: Laurel Jean Larson
persons.notes: Reading teacher (ret.). 3 children. Her husband Ollie encountered Kendall Thomas Fortney in Vietnam.

persons.name: Linda Rae Larson
persons.notes: 4 children.

persons.name: Luke Everett Madsen
persons.notes: Spanish teacher, varsity coach. Married Jennifer Krenzelok (b. 10 Feb 1973, special ed teacher), 3 August 1996, Grace Lutheran, Eau Claire WI.

persons.name: Lynn Renee Bergum Kolpack
persons.notes: Elementary teacher. Married Keith Kolpack (b. 20 June 1949; HS Vocational Ag teacher), 28 August 1976.

persons.name: Lynn Marie Langford Jones
persons.notes: Accountant. Married Jeffrey Jones (b. 16 Mar 1960, Minneapolis MN), 19 Aug 1988. Divorced 2001.

persons.name: Marion Lucile Fortney
persons.notes: Died of meningitis, aged 10.

persons.name: Mary Ann Larson
persons.notes: Nurse. 3 children (divorced).

persons.name: Mason Daniel Madsen
persons.notes: Twin.

persons.name: Matthew James Kolpack
persons.notes: HS Technical Education teacher.

persons.name: Michael Dee Fortney
persons.notes: 2 daughters.

persons.name: Michelle Ann Fortney Montgomery
persons.notes: Claims examiner.

persons.name: Monrad 'Doc' Kenneth Dahl
persons.notes: Physical Therapist.

persons.name: Myrtie Susanna Fortney
persons.notes: Youngest child of Hans & Maria. Married Andrew Ole Larson of Menomonie, WI. Andrew Ole Larson born 31 May 1908 Menomonie WI, died March 1986 Menomonie WI. Carpenter and teacher. Her five children were Alan's beloved 'Larson cousins.' Cousin Laurel's husband Ollie encountered Kendall Thomas in Vietnam.

persons.name: Tonetta Marthia "Nettie" Fortney
persons.notes: Married Rev. Frederick Dahl. Their daughter Sylvia Deason did extensive genealogical research on the Fortney line.

persons.name: Noa Kay Bergum
persons.notes: Died 29 February 1997.

persons.name: Ole Knutson Forthun
persons.notes: Farm manager Bnr #8. Married Kirsti Kristensdotter Fuglesteg, 10 June 1807.

persons.name: Ole Knutson Forthun
persons.notes: Farm manager Bnr #8 from 1682. Married Gjørond Sjursdotter (from Yttri) in 1679.

persons.name: Oliver John Fortney
persons.notes: First married Susana (Suzy) Marie Sjolden (b. 5 May 1913), 21 November 1933. Second married Lilian Gregerson (b. 14 September 1896, d. 18 May 1977), 16 December 1948.

persons.name: Orland John Larson
persons.notes: 2 sons.

persons.name: Peter Andrew Kolpack
persons.notes: College student (as of 2007).

persons.name: Phoebe Echo Södergren
persons.notes: Married Clifford (Johnson) Kent. Her comment about a non-laying chicken — "Now that's what I call a dumb cluck" — became a family legend.

persons.name: Rachael Fortney
persons.notes: Adopted daughter of Alan & Jill. Biological father: Joe. Lives in Dana Point, CA (as of 2010). Career in real estate and escrow; holds California Real Estate License.

persons.name: Ralph Clarence Fortney
persons.notes: Retired. 2 daughters, 1 son.

persons.name: Robert Mulhearn
persons.notes: Married Agnes McEntee. Together had ten children. The American Mulhearn family descends from this couple.

persons.name: Scott Nathan Bergum
persons.notes: Career US Army. Married Shari Maus Richardson (b. 16 November 1958; Secretary), 14 May 1993.

persons.name: Selma Kathrina Fortney
persons.notes: Married Nelmer Bergum, 5 June 1925. Nelmer Bergum: Farmer. Born 21 November 1894, died 3 March 1983, Wheeler, WI.

persons.name: Shirley Mulhearn
persons.notes: Married Andrew B. Andersen II. Together had six children including Jill Andersen (Fortney).

persons.name: Sonje Ann Dahl Jessen
persons.notes: Daughter of Adrian & Virginia Dahl. 3 sons. 2 grandsons, 2 granddaughters, 1 adopted grandchild.

persons.name: Stanley Nelmer Bergum
persons.notes: University teacher (retired). 1 daughter, 2 sons.

persons.name: Steven Dahl
persons.notes: Chemical engineer, BP Anchorage AK. Jaimee MacDonald also a chemical engineer, BP Anchorage.

persons.name: Steven Dale Fortney
persons.notes: Author & professor.

persons.name: Susana Mathilda Fortney
persons.notes: First child of Hans & Maria. Died January 1909 of smallpox, aged 19.

persons.name: Sylvia Dahl
persons.notes: Later Sylvia Deason (b. 1946?). Did thorough genealogical study of the Fortney line.

persons.name: Synneva Clausdotter
persons.notes: Married Knut Aamundson Forthun in 1653, bringing Bnr #8 to the family. Key figure in establishing the Forthun farm line.

persons.name: Thomas Frederick Fortney
persons.notes: Died young, 1966.

persons.name: Thomas Kendahl Fortney
persons.notes: Physical education teacher and politician. UW heavyweight wrestler (1928, 1932, 1935, 1938). Died in Detroit in 1944. He and Elsie had no children. Married Elsie Carlson, 5 October 1928, Chicago, IL. Elsie (born 1904, died 1979; nurse) never remarried and kept his photo by her bed the rest of her life.

persons.name: Thomas Andrew Larson
persons.notes: Computer data specialist. 1 son.

persons.name: Thomas Olson Forthun
persons.notes: Emigrated to America 1853. Settled in Franklin County, then Vernon County, Wisconsin. Married Susanna Johannesdotter Ottum, 13 October 1854.

persons.name: Todd Arling Jessen
persons.notes: 1 son André (age 7 in 2007), 1 daughter Ashley (age 5 in 2007).

persons.name: Tom Kromroy
persons.notes: Son of Sylvia Dahl Kromroy.

persons.name: Torger Olson Forthun
persons.notes: Farm manager Bnr #8. Married Britha Halvorsdatter in 1714.

persons.name: Una Elizabeth Södergren
persons.notes: Married John Milton MD.

persons.name: Virgil A. Fortney
persons.notes: Married Betty Baker. Children: Philip, Robert, and Marcia Fortney. 1 granddaughter, Leslie.

persons.name: William Mulhearn
persons.notes: Emigrated from Ballyshannon, County Clare. Father of Robert Mulhearn.
